title: Replace allorigins.win proxy provider with proxycroxy.io

requirements.text: In the tab navigation hook (useTabs.ts), replace all occurrences of the allorigins.win CORS proxy URL with https://proxycroxy.io as the proxy provider in the fallback chain and any URL construction logic.

quotes: make the provider not allorigins.win make it https://proxycroxy.io

acceptanceCriteria: No references to allorigins.win remain in useTabs.ts
The proxy fallback chain uses https://proxycroxy.io as the provider
Proxied URLs are correctly constructed using https://proxycroxy.io

requirements.text: In TabContent.tsx and HomeSearch.tsx, replace any hardcoded allorigins.win proxy references with https://proxycroxy.io to ensure the iframe proxy loading uses the updated provider.

quotes: make the provider not allorigins.win make it https://proxycroxy.io

acceptanceCriteria: No references to allorigins.win remain in TabContent.tsx or HomeSearch.tsx

requirements.text: In ProxyInfoPanel.tsx, update any displayed CORS proxy route descriptions or labels that reference allorigins.win to instead show https://proxycroxy.io.

quotes: make the provider not allorigins.win make it https://proxycroxy.io

acceptanceCriteria: No references to allorigins.win appear in the ProxyInfoPanel UI
The panel correctly displays https://proxycroxy.io as the proxy provider

constraints: Only replace allorigins.win references — do not change any other proxy providers or services
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Changing the ProxyLinks page card list
